user.title: Connect to VoIP.ms
user.description: If you need help with the configuration, see the API documentation on the VoIP.ms website.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the VoIP.ms API. Check network connectivity and Home Assistant logs for details.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid authentication. Check your API credentials and Home Assistant logs for the VoIP.ms response.
error.invalid_credentials: Invalid API username or password. Use the credentials from Main Menu → SOAP and REST/JSON API in the VoIP.ms portal.
error.ip_not_enabled: Your Home Assistant public IP is not allowlisted. Add it under API settings in the VoIP.ms portal.
error.api_not_enabled: The VoIP.ms API is not enabled for your account. Enable it under Main Menu → SOAP and REST/JSON API.
error.missing_credentials: API username or password was not provided to VoIP.ms. Re-enter your credentials and try again.
